title: Fire Fox Origin
description: This is a custom origin I made that adds a fire fox check the description to find out more.
body:
This mod adds a new orgin called a Fire fox, they are small,have less health and scared of water but they are also faster, immune to fire as well as also being on to set things on fire when they punch and entity. 

I will work on fixing things eventually especially with the impact not appearing that will be done hopefully (if i can find time too lol.)
